subject: Crash recovery commit pushed — 3 proven items committed, 2 lost, 1 blocked input
body:
Ubuntu headless session crashed overnight. Prior Codex session context lost.

Reconstructed state from disk artifacts and committed what survived:
- scripts/util/hash.js, scripts/util/trace.js (proven items 5)
- scripts/lane-worker.js trace/checkpoint integration (proven item 4)
- scripts/git-relay.sh (bash transport)
- reports/swarmmind-crash-recovery-2026-05-04.md

config/resilience-policy.json was already in tree from prior relay push.

LOST in crash (claimed in prior outbox but never committed):
- ConstraintEngine class in constraint-lattice.js
- driftScore() in swarmmind-verify.js

These must be re-implemented but are blocked on missing reference doc.

Commit SHA: cfac63a
Pushed to: origin/main

convergence_gate.claim: Crash recovery commit cfac63a pushed with 3 surviving proven items; 2 items lost and blocked on missing April152026mainreferencepoint reference doc.

blocked_input.description: Reference document from April 15 2026 main reference point. Required to re-implement ConstraintEngine and driftScore and continue remaining bundle items.
